description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a deep blue fabric upholstery and a modular design. It features three main seating sections, including a chaise lounge on the left side, and is equipped with four large, loose back cushions for comfort. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, matching the overall boxy and contemporary aesthetic of the sofa. The seat cushions are thick and appear to be separate but closely fitted, providing ample seating space. The sofa sits low to the ground on short, block-style legs that are mostly hidden from view. Its clean lines and solid color make it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, deep blue modular sectional sofa with wide armrests, loose back cushions, and a chaise lounge. The upholstery is smooth and solid, and the sofa has a contemporary, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, including the chaise lounge on the left, three main seat sections, and four large back cushions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the thickness of the armrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sofa, the seams of the upholstery, and the arrangement of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the straight armrest and the alignment of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four large, loose back cushions and three thick, individual seat cushions; cushions are uniform in size and not attached, with a chaise lounge section on the left.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a boxy, contemporary profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs that are mostly hidden from view, likely made of wood or plastic, positioned at the corners and possibly with additional central support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with a continuous structure, topped with four large, loose cushions for added comfort and support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
